---
title: "main-functions"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{main-functions}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(geographr)
```

```{r}
plot_regime_trends(democracy_data, countries = c("Afghanistan", "Canada", "United States"), min_year = 1950)
```

This should make a line plot showing a country's `spatial_democracy` over time for the selected countries.

```{r}
summarize_regime_types(democracy_data, year = 2020)
```

This should show how many countries were in each `regime_category` during a selected year.

```{r}
find_regime_changes(democracy_data, country = "Afghanistan")
```

This should find years where a country experienced a regime change using `has_regime_change_lag` and display the associated `regime_category`.
